name: site-e2e
description: End-to-end tests for the easy-to-read site

scripts.build-site: cd ../site && npm install && API_URL=http://localhost:7071 SIMPLIFIED_TEXT_URL=http://localhost:7071/api/simplified INTERACTION_URL=http://localhost:7071/api/interaction FEEDBACK_URL=http://localhost:7071/api/feedback CARBON_FOOTPRINT_URL=http://localhost:7071/api/carbon-footprint npx dotenvx run --ignore MISSING_ENV_FILE -- eleventy
